---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Propose a new feature, app, or runtime optimization for Mubix OS Lite
title: "[FEATURE] <Short title of the proposed feature>"
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ""
---

### 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I want to edit code offline but the Editor app requires internet connection..."

### 🛠️ Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this fits into the existing workspace, dock, window system, or filesystem architecture.

### ⚡ Performance & Memory Impact Assessment
Because Mubix OS Lite is built specifically for **old machines & low-end PCs**, all features must be optimized:
- **Estimated Memory Footprint** (Low/Medium/High):
- **CPU/Rendering Cost** (Does it require high frequency requestAnimationFrame? CSS animations?):
- **External Dependencies** (Does this require importing any new npm packages? *Hint: Vanilla JS preferred*):

### 🎨 Design & Layout (Mockups / Visuals)
If applicable, describe or sketch the interface (e.g. how the icon looks on the Dock, window size parameters, color palette integration).

### 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, benchmarks, or code snippets here.
